channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cubana Chief Priest loses APC nomination for Imo Reps seat
item.description: Naija socialite and businessman, Pascal “Cubana Chief Priest” Okechukwu, never manage to carry the All Progressives Congress (APC) ticket for Imo State House of Representatives seat. Him contest for t...

item.title: Pakistan, Turkiye, and Azerbaijan Enhance Trilateral Cooperation, Says President Aliyev
item.description: President Ilham Aliyev of Azerbaijan met with Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz in Baku, highlighting that Azerbaijan-Pakistan relations are being strengthened within a trilateral framework including...

item.title: Matt Brittin Appointed BBC Director-General After Consulting Gordon Brown
item.description: Matt Brittin has been appointed as the new director-general of the BBC, succeeding Tim Davie. Brittin, 57, previously served as president of Google in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa for a decade,...

item.title: Understanding the Global Risks and Impacts of Nuclear War
item.description: Amid rising geopolitical tensions, the potential consequences of nuclear conflict have regained urgent attention. The Bulletin explores the renewed study of nuclear war and its global environmental ef...

item.title: Hulk Hogan Escorts Cyndi Lauper at the 1985 Grammy Awards
item.description: At the 27th Annual Grammy Awards on February 26, 1985, an unforgettable moment occurred when Cyndi Lauper was accompanied by WWF Champion Hulk Hogan, who acted as her bodyguard for the evening. In a s...

item.title: Ms Hills seeks strategic partners to grow her luxury brand GemsByHills after 13 years of success
item.description: For over 13 years, Ugwu Nkechinyere Obumneme, better known as Ms Hills, don dey run CMHairByHills, one premium hair brand wey don gain respect for consistency, quality, and trust for Naija. Unlike man...

item.title: UK Eurovision entrant Sam Battle reacts graciously after finishing last with minimal points
item.description: Sam Battle, known as Look Mum No Computer, represented the United Kingdom in the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 with his song 'Eins, Zwei, Drei'. Despite his efforts, the UK finished last, receiving zer...

item.title: FIA arrests two in Karachi for posing as government officials using fake documents
item.description: In Karachi, the Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) Anti-Corruption Circle has detained two persons, including a woman, for impersonating government officials. The suspects claimed to represent the so-...

item.title: Experts Advise Safe Relocation of Snakes in Islamabad Amid Increased Sightings
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Residents of Islamabad have been noticing snakes more often in various parts of the city, which has raised some concern. Wildlife experts emphasise that killing snakes is unnecessary and po...

item.title: NEET-UG 2026 Paper Leak: CBI Probes NTA Insiders and Multi-State Middlemen Network
item.description: The NEET-UG 2026 examination paper leak scandal has created major shockwaves across India, forcing the authorities to schedule a re-examination on 21st June for over 2.2 million aspirants. According t...

item.title: Barbara Bates: Vintage St. Patrick’s Day Portrait from the 1940s
item.description: Barbara Bates (1925–1969) was an American actress and model who gained recognition in Hollywood during the 1940s. Celebrated for her fresh, wholesome beauty, bright eyes, and warm smile, she embodied ...

item.title: Reflections on Life Choices and Personal Satisfaction from Ontario’s Class of 1973

item.title: How Nigerians Fit Start Investing in Stocks from Just ₦1,000
item.description: For 2026, investing for small money don become more possible for Naija people thanks to fintech apps wey dey allow fractional investing. This article waka through how even with just ₦1,000, small inve...

item.title: Cerebras Overcomes Early Financial Struggles to Become a $60 Billion AI Chip Company
item.description: Cerebras Systems, now a public company valued at around $60 billion, faced near-collapse in 2019 when it burned $8 million per month trying to solve unprecedented technical challenges. Founded to crea...

item.title: Mpumalanga Police Investigate Fatal Shooting of Alleged Rhino Poaching Kingpin
item.description: Joseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, a 62-year-old man alleged to be a key figure in rhino poaching in Mpumalanga, was fatally shot at his business premises in Mkhuhlu on 16 May 2026. This incident occurred jus...

item.title: Celebrated British Soprano Dame Felicity Lott Passes Away at 79
item.description: Dame Felicity Lott, one of the most esteemed British sopranos, passed away on 15 May at the age of 79 following a recent revelation that she had been diagnosed with terminal cancer. Her illustrious ca...

item.title: Rajinikanth clarifies he did not intervene in Tamil Nadu political negotiations
item.description: On Sunday, May 17, 2026, Tamil cinema superstar Rajinikanth addressed the media at his Poes Garden residence in Chennai, clarifying speculations regarding his involvement in political negotiations fol...

item.title: Cat Matlala Offers Evidence on Corruption in Exchange for Possible Leniency
item.description: Vusimusi “Cat” Matlala, who faces charges of corruption and attempted murder, is reportedly in discussions about a potential plea agreement with the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (Idac)...

item.title: Rana Sanaullah discusses possible changes to voting age and 28th Amendment
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Adviser to the Prime Minister on Political and Public Affairs, Rana Sanaullah, confirmed that the government is considering a proposal to increase the voting age in Pakistan. Speaking on Ge...

item.title: Buffalo Sabres comeback sets up Game 7 against Montreal Canadiens
item.description: In a thrilling Eastern Conference semifinal clash, the Buffalo Sabres overcame an early deficit to defeat the Montreal Canadiens 8-3, forcing a decisive Game 7. Montreal initially took a 3-1 lead midw...
